Our Process

How It Works

From concept to completion, we make interior design simple and stress-free

01

Free Consultation

Share your vision with our experts. We discuss your style, budget, and timeline.

02

Design Concept

5% Payment

Our designers create personalized 3D renders and mood boards for your approval.

03

Detailed Planning

Precise measurements and material selection with transparent pricing.

04

Execution

60% Payment

Our skilled craftsmen bring your design to life with quality materials.

05

Handover

100% Full Payment

Final walkthrough, quality check, and your dream home is ready to enjoy.

Start Your Project
About HSR Layout

HSR Layout is Bangalore's planned residential paradise, known for its wide roads, systematic sectors, and proximity to tech parks. Popular among IT professionals and young families, this locality features modern apartments and gated communities that call for smart, contemporary interior designs with functional spaces for work and play.

Life in HSR Layout

27th Main Road & BDA Complex

The commercial spine of HSR with cafes, restaurants, and premium apartments. Homes here benefit from modern, minimalist designs with smart storage.

Agara Lake & Sector 2

Lake-facing properties command premium interiors. We design homes with large windows to capture views and biophilic elements to connect with nature.

Sector 4 & 5 Residentials

Family-oriented sectors with gated communities like Mantri Serenity. Spacious layouts allow for dedicated kids' rooms, study areas, and entertainment zones.

Tech Parks Proximity

Close to Outer Ring Road tech hubs, many residents work from home. Ergonomic home offices with good lighting and acoustics are a top request.

Design Tips for HSR Layout Homes

1

Leverage High Ceilings

Many HSR apartments have generous ceiling heights. Use vertical storage, tall bookshelves, and statement lighting to make the most of this space advantage.

2

Design a Productive Home Office

With most HSR residents in IT, a well-designed workspace with natural light, ergonomic furniture, and video-call-friendly backgrounds is essential.

3

Create Pet-Friendly Spaces

HSR has many pet parents! Design with scratch-resistant flooring, built-in feeding stations, and cozy nooks for your furry family members.

4

Maximize Balcony Potential

HSR's pleasant climate makes balconies ideal for extended living. Add comfortable seating, vertical gardens, and ambient lighting for year-round enjoyment.
